CARDVALUEOVERLAY-SEARCH_BRANCH.title: Search branch
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-SEARCH_BRANCH.hover.des: Candidate continuations retained at each fully branched play. Higher values can improve search quality, but cost rises rapidly. Values above 3 are not recommended.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-TURN_SEARCH_DEPTH.title: Turn search depth
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-TURN_SEARCH_DEPTH.hover: Maximum cards evaluated per simulated turn. Up to the first 8 plays use full branching; later plays continue along the single best line. Values above 8 are not recommended and may cause noticeable late-run stutter.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-MINIMUM_SIMULATION_RUNS: Earliest checkpoint for each independently solved 4-, 8-, and 12-turn dEV. Checkpoints advance by 15 runs and each horizon tests its own Bonferroni-adjusted interval.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-MAXIMUM_SIMULATION_RUNS: Hard run limit for each independently solved 4-, 8-, and 12-turn paired dEV. Runs are evaluated in checkpoints of 15. If this is below the minimum, the effective maximum is raised to the minimum.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-COMPLEX_CARD_MINIMUM_RU: Minimum checkpoint for cards with draw, generation, movement, transformation, or auto-play effects. Their wider outcome distributions default to 30 runs. The effective value is kept between the ordinary minimum and maximum.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-CONFIDENCE_LEVEL_PERCEN: Marginal two-sided Student-t interval shown above each card. Early stopping uses a wider Bonferroni-adjusted interval derived from this level and the number of remaining checkpoints.
When enabled, each 4-, 8-, and 12-turn horizon may stop independently after its configured minimum once the adjusted interval has a stable sign. Disable to run every horizon to the maximum.
